changeSet.author: danikanov
changeSet.sql:
alter table results.results drop constraint ck_result;
alter table results.results add constraint ck_result check ( result in ( 'PLANNED', 'RUNNING', 'EXCLUDED', 'INACTIVE', 'COMPLETED', 'DOUBTFUL', 'FORBIDDEN_CONTENT_DETECTED', 'CAPTCHA_DETECTED', 'BAD_IP', 'DNS_ERROR', 'SOCKET_ERROR', 'HTTP_SERVER_SEND_NO_RESPONSE', 'PAGE_NOT_FOUND', 'INTERNAL_ERROR', 'TIMEOUT_ERROR', 'STOPPED'));

rollback.sql:
alter table results.results drop constraint ck_result;
alter table results.results add constraint ck_result check ( result in ( 'PLANNED', 'RUNNING', 'EXCLUDED', 'INACTIVE', 'COMPLETED', 'DOUBTFUL', 'FORBIDDEN_CONTENT_DETECTED', 'CAPTCHA_DETECTED', 'BAD_IP', 'DNS_ERROR', 'SOCKET_ERROR', 'HTTP_SERVER_SEND_NO_RESPONSE', 'PAGE_NOT_FOUND', 'INTERNAL_ERROR', 'TIMEOUT_ERROR' ));
